Title: RITUEL Amethyst Gua Sha Stone
Body (HTML):
The ancient tool that sculpts your jawline, drains puffiness, and transforms your skin in 5 minutes every morning.

Gua sha physically moves fluid in your lymphatic system. It boosts circulation, sculpts your facial muscles, and produces visible results that no serum can replicate. This is the tool that starts the ritual.

How to use:

  1. Apply a few drops of facial oil or moisturiser to clean skin
  2. Sweep the stone upward and outward - jawline, cheekbones, forehead, neck
  3. Use light pressure. Always move upward. Always toward your ears.
  4. 5 minutes every morning. Results build with every session.

What you get:

  • Natural amethyst gua sha stone
  • Each piece is unique in colour and pattern - that is the natural stone
  • Works with any facial oil, serum, or moisturiser

Title: RITUEL Double-Sided Amethyst Facial Roller
Body (HTML):
Two heads, one roller, zero puffiness. The facial massage tool that completes your morning ritual.

Where gua sha sculpts, the roller soothes. Use it before your gua sha to warm up the skin and boost blood flow - or after to calm redness and drain any remaining puffiness. The small head is designed specifically for the delicate under-eye area.

How to use:

  1. Use the large head on cheeks, forehead, and jawline
  2. Use the small head gently under the eyes and around the nose
  3. Always roll outward - from the centre of your face toward your ears
  4. Use with facial oil or your regular serum for the best glide

Title: RITUEL Rose Ice Roller - Facial De-Puffer
Body (HTML):
The most satisfying step in the ritual. Roll it over your face in the morning and look like you slept 10 hours - even when you did not.

The ice roller constricts blood vessels, drains overnight puffiness, reduces redness, and closes pores. Use it as the final step of your ritual to lock in everything the gua sha just did. Once you start, you will not want to skip a morning.

How to use:

  1. Fill the silicone mould with water and freeze overnight
  2. After your gua sha or roller, roll from the centre of your face outward
  3. Focus under the eyes, along the jaw, and across the forehead
  4. 60-90 seconds is all you need

What you get:
